ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_HVAC_UDS_VC_20200416
ddt:Target.Description:
[6]Oct 12th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Implemented Diag version for uploading to Renault CDB.
[5]Apr 16th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified Communication protocol.
[4]Apr 9th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Added list index into DID$4456, based on Rev7.
[3]Nov 12th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Updated some DM and CF items based on Item List Rev4.
[2] Oct 24th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Updated Config items.
[1] Oct 16th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Replaced many items.
[N] Mar 20th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Initial Creation, based on Rev N.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DataRead_$4007_#004_bit6_Front heated seat switch high (right side) indicator
DataRead_$4007_#004_bit4_Front heated seat switch low (right side) indicator

Item.Text: All faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled(01h)
No request for PTC number thermal request(Fh)
Low speed engine fan speed request(01h)
Mid speed engine fan speed request(02h)
High speed engine fan speed request(03h)
Low speed engine fan speed request(01h)
Mid speed engine fan speed request(02h)
High speed engine fan speed request(03h)
Engine stopped by normal system request(02h)
Engine stopped by other cause OR Engine stopped by normal system request(03h)
Engine stopped by normal driver request(04h)
Heating seat high relay not requested(00h)
Heating seat high relay not requested(00h)
Heating seat high relay not requested(00h)
Heating seat high relay not requested(00h)
Load Cut Off For life On Board(01h)
Load Cut Off For life On Board 2(02h)
Load Cut Off For Pulse Compatibility(04h)
No ICE engine starting request for ZEV mode(00h)
ICE engine starting request for ZEV mode(01h)
No failure and HV PTC ON(00h)
No failure and HV PTC OFF(01h)
De-ice vehicle state 1 request : battery loading(01h)
De-ice vehicle state 3 request : high speed driving(03h)
De-ice vehicle state 4 request : idle state driving(04h)
De-ice vehicle state 5 request : low battery SOC(05h)
De-ice vehicle state 1 request : battery loading(01h)
De-ice vehicle state 3 request : high speed driving(03h)
De-ice vehicle state 4 request : idle state driving(04h)
De-ice vehicle state 5 request : low battery SOC(05h)
Life on Board Low SOC power limitation(01h)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$40DA_#004_bit0_(TBD)Battery cooling entry temperature target value
DataRead.FFD_$40DB_#004_bit0_(TBD)Battery cooling entry temperature real value
DataRead.FFD_$40DE_#004_bit7_(TBD)Battery cooling entry temperature target flag
DataRead.FFD_$40E5_#004_bit1_(TBD)coolant temp. target for thremal recovery
DataRead.FFD_$40E6_#004_bit1_(TBD)coolant actual temp. for thremal recovery

Item.Text: DEF door open when auto, DEF door closed when manual(00h)
DEF door open when auto, DEF door open when manual(01h)
DEF door closed when auto, DEF door open when manual(02h)
DEF door closed when auto, DEF door closed when manual(03h)
Trizone with temperature and with distribution(14h)
With Sensor type 2 - P02F - Air type(03h)
With Sensor type 4 - B02E - Air type(05h)
With Sensor type 6 - P02F - Fin type(07h)
With Sensor type 7 - B02E - Fin type(08h)
With HV Batt Cond by Air(02h)
With HV Batt Cond by Water(03h)
With 2 relays high-low heating seat B02E(02h)
With 2 relays high-low heating seat L21B(03h)
With Coolant Temp Sensor on engine(02h)
With Coolant Temp Sensor on heater core input(03h)
With Coolant Temp Sensor on boiler output(04h)
With HVAC blower output type1(500Hz PWM)(02h)
With HVAC blower output type2(35Hz PWM)(03h)
Heat Seat Front Righ + Front Left(07h)
Heat Seat Front Righ + Front Left + Second Rear Right + Second Rear Left(1Fh)
Front Row + Second Row (Left / right) + AQS + HS(181Fh)
